painPoints: Mobile performance score of 31/100 — site takes 8.4 seconds to load on mobile, causing visitors to abandon before booking
Homepage weighs approximately 62 MB due to uncompressed images and heavy scripts, creating extreme page weight
Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) of 8.4 seconds on mobile far exceeds acceptable thresholds
Total Blocking Time of 16.2 seconds on mobile ties up the browser and prevents interaction
Desktop performance score of only 59/100, indicating optimization issues beyond just mobile
No geo modifier (city/location) included in meta titles across any key service pages
Missing H1 headings on multiple pages including homepage, massage, membership, and contact pages
Decorative H1 tags pulled from sliders on service pages provide no SEO value
Meta descriptions are auto-pulled or exceed 280+ characters on several pages, reducing click-through effectiveness
Missing meta description entirely on the contact page
Images are uncompressed and not served in modern formats, contributing to the 62 MB page weight
Analytics running on deprecated Universal Analytics (UA) instead of GA4, meaning paid campaigns would launch without proper measurement
Meta Pixel is installed but sitting completely idle — no active retargeting or paid social campaigns running
No Google Ads or paid search campaigns active despite zero local competitors running meaningful paid search
No Google Local Services Ads listing and no Google Guaranteed badge
No remarketing or display tags detected
AI visibility score of only 32/100 — EvolvE surfaces in AI assistants for cryotherapy only and is absent for infrared sauna, massage, body contouring, and facials
Absent from AI assistant results for 4 of 5 service lines including infrared sauna, lymphatic drainage massage, body contouring, and couples massage
No service-specific content depth for non-cryotherapy services, causing AI platforms to recommend specialists and med spas instead
Invisible in organic search results for infrared sauna, massage, facials, and body contouring keywords
Ranking only #4 for 'cryotherapy austin' in organic search despite strong reviews
No presence in Google Local Services Ads, ceding the top-of-page position to competitors
Reviews for non-cryotherapy service lines (sauna, massage, body contouring) are sparse, limiting AI and search visibility for those categories
Bing Places listing unclaimed
No short-form video content on TikTok or YouTube despite wellness content performing strongly in those formats
LinkedIn and X (Twitter) profiles are dormant and inactive
No YouTube channel detected, missing opportunity for recovery and education video content
No TikTok profile detected, missing a high-opportunity platform for wellness content
Paid social advertising is completely absent despite having an established Instagram following of 5,418 and a ready Meta Pixel
Cross-page content overlap on /services/ (32%) and /contact/ (31%) pages may dilute SEO signals
Lack of structured, service-specific content prevents AI platforms from associating EvolvE with non-cryo service categories
No paid amplification strategy to convert existing social audience into booked sessions
